hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM | grep -q '[.]php$' || exit 0; php -r 'exit(function_exists("uopz_set_return")?0:1);' || { echo 'Pre-commit: uopz is disabled — run `uon`, then commit (the unit suite needs it).' >&2; exit 2; }; vendor/bin/codecept parallel-run unit --workers=10 || { echo 'Pre-commit: unit suite failed; fix before committing.' >&2; exit 2; }
hooks.statusMessage: Pre-commit: unit suite (parallel-run, 10 workers, when PHP staged)
